title: Revert Toggle Sneak
description: Revert Toggle Sneak brings back the classic toggle-sneak behavior. With this mod, sneaking stays active through inventories, menus, and other screens.
body: In 1.21.9, Mojang changed toggle-sneak so that opening any screen automatically unsneaks you. This mod restores the old behavior by keeping the sneak key pressed through inventories, menus, and other GUIs until you toggle it off yourself.
